content.problemStatement:
Chef is exploring pointers in C. Chef has an array of integers and wants to print its elements starting from the last element back to the first.

Your task is to help Chef to print the array in reverse using a pointer.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer `T`, the number of test cases.
The first line of each test case contains an integer `n`, the number of elements in the array.
The second line contains `n` space separated integers.


Output Format
For each test case, print the `n` integers in reverse order separated by a space.
